overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a fantasy game (Hogwarts Legacy) showing students in wizard robes practicing spellcasting in an outdoor wooden pavilion classroom. The scene is set in a forest clearing with natural morning light filtering through the open-air structure, featuring multiple wooden tables with books and magical implements.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor magic classroom pavilion in forest clearing

events.description: student in foreground raises wand and casts a spell with visible gesture
student at left table performs wand movement practicing a charm

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of wizard students practicing spellcasting at wooden tables in an outdoor pavilion classroom

notable_agents.action: student wearing green scarf casting spells with wand raised at foreground table
student in dark robes observing or preparing spells at the left side table

entered.detail: rustic wooden beam structure with angled roof providing partial cover
dark wooden chalkboard at the back of the classroom area
sturdy wooden tables with benches arranged for student practice
lush green forest with tall trees and grassy clearing visible through open walls
open books and scattered papers on the tabletops

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary throughout this segment, capturing a semi-covered outdoor classroom pavilion where wizard students practice spellcasting. The wooden structure features open sides revealing a forest meadow backdrop, while students in robes stand at scattered tables with books and wands. Natural morning light filters through the roof beams, illuminating the stone floor tiles as students perform wand gestures and casting motions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, cinematic view of a magical classroom that blends a structured wooden pavilion with the wildness of a surrounding forest meadow. It begins by capturing the semi-covered outdoor space where students in robes are gathered around scattered tables laden with books and wands. As the camera holds its position, the focus settles on the students performing fluid wand gestures and casting motions across the stone floor tiles. The scene is unified by natural morning light that filters through the overhead roof beams, casting a soft glow that connects the interior academic setting to the lush greenery visible through the open sides.
